testcase.name: verifyCartPage

testcase.name: verifyProductCount

failure.message: Products cnt should be available did not expect [0] but found [0]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: Products cnt should be available did not expect [0] but found [0] at tests.CartPageTest.verifyProductCount(CartPageTest.java:29) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1596) ... Removed 33 stack frames

testcase.name: PriceValidation
